steps.title: Recognize percentage of percentage multiplication
steps.content: The problem has two conditions: 50% of all items are blue, and 24% of the blue items have labels. To find items that are both blue and labeled, we need 24% of 50%. The fastest approach: multiply the two percentages as decimals.

steps.title: Multiply and identify the percentage
steps.content:
Convert to decimals: 24% = 0.24 and 50% = 0.50.
$$0.24 \times 0.50 = 0.12$$Converting back to percentage: $$0.12 = 12\%$$That confirms B is correct.
